infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cosmo needs access to your camera to take photos for location guessing
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cosmo needs access to your location to record photo coordinates and make guesses
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Cosmo needs access to your photo library to allow you to upload photos

plugins.cameraPermission: Cosmo needs access to your camera to take photos for location guessing

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Cosmo needs access to your location to record photo coordinates and make guesses

plugins.photosPermission: Cosmo needs access to your photo library to allow you to upload photos
